syntax_14258.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14258.title: Has GUI
syntax_14258.description:
Checks whether the given player(s) has/have a GUI open.
Deprecated: Use ExprGetPlayerSession and check for null instead.
syntax_14258.syntax_pattern:
%players% (has|have) a gui [open]
%players% (doesn't|does not|do not|don't) have a gui [open]

en:
Checks whether the given player(s) has/have a GUI open.
Deprecated: Use ExprGetPlayerSession and check for null instead.

syntax_14259.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14259.title: Menu is Destroyed
syntax_14259.description:
Checks whether the given menu is destroyed.
A destroyed menu cannot be opened or interacted with.
Menus are usually destroyed when a new menu with the same ID is created, or when the server shuts down.

en:
Checks whether the given menu is destroyed.
A destroyed menu cannot be opened or interacted with.
Menus are usually destroyed when a new menu with the same ID is created, or when the server shuts down.

syntax_14260.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14260.title: Clear Session
syntax_14260.description:
Clears the menu session of the given player(s).
This will remove the content of the gui they have open, but will not close the gui itself.
If 'refresh' is specified, the player's gui will be refreshed to reflect the cleared session.

en:
Clears the menu session of the given player(s).
This will remove the content of the gui they have open, but will not close the gui itself.
If 'refresh' is specified, the player's gui will be refreshed to reflect the cleared session.

syntax_14261.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14261.title: Close Menu
syntax_14261.description: Close the menu for a player (if opened).

en: Close the menu for a player (if opened).

syntax_14262.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14262.title: Close Menu Session
syntax_14262.description: Closes a menu session, effectively closing the menu for the player.

en: Closes a menu session, effectively closing the menu for the player.

syntax_14263.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14263.title: Destroy Menu
syntax_14263.description:
Destroy the given menu.
A destroyed menu cannot be opened or interacted with.
If a menu is destroyed while players have it open, their menus will be forcibly closed.
If the menu has been destroyed already, this effect does nothing.

en:
Destroy the given menu.
A destroyed menu cannot be opened or interacted with.
If a menu is destroyed while players have it open, their menus will be forcibly closed.
If the menu has been destroyed already, this effect does nothing.

syntax_14257.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14257.title: On Page Turn
syntax_14257.event_values: event-player, event-menu, event-menusession, event-page, event-future page, event-title(can be set)

en: None

syntax_14264.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14264.title: Insert Page
syntax_14264.description:
Insert a new page into a menu.
You can optionally specify the page index, layout, player inventory layout, and title for the new page.
If the page index is not provided, the new page will be added at the end of the menu.
syntax_14264.syntax_pattern: insert page [%number%] [to %menu%] [with layout %strings%] [with player inv[entory] layout %strings%] [with [new] title (%string%|%textcomponent%)]

en:
Insert a new page into a menu.
You can optionally specify the page index, layout, player inventory layout, and title for the new page.
If the page index is not provided, the new page will be added at the end of the menu.

syntax_14265.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14265.title: Open Menu
syntax_14265.description:
Open a menu for a player.
You can optionally specify a page number to open a specific page of the menu.

en:
Open a menu for a player.
You can optionally specify a page number to open a specific page of the menu.

syntax_14266.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14266.title: Refresh Menu Session
syntax_14266.description:
Refresh the menu session, updating the inventory view.
If a slot number is provided, only that slot will be refreshed.
If no slot number is provided, the entire inventory will be refreshed.
Does nothing if the menu receptacle mode is static or the session is not active.

en:
Refresh the menu session, updating the inventory view.
If a slot number is provided, only that slot will be refreshed.
If no slot number is provided, the entire inventory will be refreshed.
Does nothing if the menu receptacle mode is static or the session is not active.

syntax_14267.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14267.title: Turn Page
syntax_14267.description:
Turn the page of the currently open menu for a player.
You can optionally specify a new title for the menu.

en:
Turn the page of the currently open menu for a player.
You can optionally specify a new title for the menu.

syntax_14268.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14268.title: Update Menu Session Title
syntax_14268.description:
Update the title of a menu session.
If 'and refresh' is included, the inventory view will be refreshed to reflect the new title immediately.

en:
Update the title of a menu session.
If 'and refresh' is included, the inventory view will be refreshed to reflect the new title immediately.

syntax_14270.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14270.title: Default Layout
syntax_14270.description: The default layout of a menu.

en: The default layout of a menu.

syntax_14271.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14271.title: Default Page
syntax_14271.description: The default page to show a menu when opened.

en: The default page to show a menu when opened.

syntax_14272.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14272.title: Default Title
syntax_14272.description:
The default title of a menu (when add a new page).
It can be a string or a text component in skbee(if exists).

en:
The default title of a menu (when add a new page).
It can be a string or a text component in skbee(if exists).

syntax_14278.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14278.title: Get All Menu IDs
syntax_14278.description:
Get all menu IDs.
This expression returns a list of all menu IDs that have been created.
Tips: This expression only returns the ids of menus have ids.

en:
Get all menu IDs.
This expression returns a list of all menu IDs that have been created.
Tips: This expression only returns the ids of menus have ids.

syntax_14279.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14279.title: Get All Menus
syntax_14279.description:
Get all menus.
This expression returns a list of all menus that have been created.
Tips: This expression only returns the menus have ids.

en:
Get all menus.
This expression returns a list of all menus that have been created.
Tips: This expression only returns the menus have ids.

syntax_14280.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14280.title: Get Menu by ID
syntax_14280.description:
Get a menu by its ID.
The ID is the one defined when creating the menu.

en:
Get a menu by its ID.
The ID is the one defined when creating the menu.

syntax_14281.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14281.title: Get Player's Menu Session
syntax_14281.description:
Get the menu session of a player.
Returns null if the player does not have an active menu session.

en:
Get the menu session of a player.
Returns null if the player does not have an active menu session.

syntax_14282.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14282.title: Hide Player Inventory
syntax_14282.description: Whether to hide the player's inventory when the menu is opened.
syntax_14282.syntax_pattern:
[the] hide player inventory of %menu%
%menu%'[s] hide player inventory

en: Whether to hide the player's inventory when the menu is opened.

syntax_14283.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14283.title: Menu ID
syntax_14283.description: Gets the ID of a menu.

en: Gets the ID of a menu.

syntax_14284.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14284.title: Menu Inventory Type
syntax_14284.description: The inventory type of a menu.

en: The inventory type of a menu.

syntax_14285.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14285.title: Menu Mode
syntax_14285.description: The mode of a menu, either `PHANTOM` or `STATIC`.

en: The mode of a menu, either `PHANTOM` or `STATIC`.

syntax_14286.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14286.title: Menu Session Icon
syntax_14286.description:
Get or set the icon(s) in specific slot(s) of a menu session.
Returns null if the session is invalid or the slot is empty.
When setting icons, all existing icons in the specified slots will be replaced.
When deleting icons, all existing icons in the specified slots will be removed.
syntax_14286.syntax_pattern:
icon of %menusession% in slot %numbers%
icon in slot %numbers% of %menusession%

en:
Get or set the icon(s) in specific slot(s) of a menu session.
Returns null if the session is invalid or the slot is empty.
When setting icons, all existing icons in the specified slots will be replaced.
When deleting icons, all existing icons in the specified slots will be removed.

syntax_14287.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14287.title: Menu Session Title
syntax_14287.description:
Get or set the title of a menu session.
Returns null if the session is invalid.

en:
Get or set the title of a menu session.
Returns null if the session is invalid.

syntax_14288.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14288.title: Menu Session's Viewer
syntax_14288.description:
Get the viewer (player) of a menu session.
Returns null if the session is invalid.

en:
Get the viewer (player) of a menu session.
Returns null if the session is invalid.

syntax_14289.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14289.title: Menu Viewers
syntax_14289.description: All players currently viewing a menu.

en: All players currently viewing a menu.

syntax_14290.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14290.title: Minimum Click Delay
syntax_14290.description: The minimum click delay (in ms) between two clicks in a menu.
syntax_14290.syntax_pattern:
[the] min(imum) click delay of %menu%
%menu%'[s] min(imum) click delay

en: The minimum click delay (in ms) between two clicks in a menu.

syntax_14291.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14291.title: Page Number
syntax_14291.description: The total number of pages in a menu.

en: The total number of pages in a menu.

syntax_14277.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14277.title: GUI of Player
syntax_14277.description: The GUI that the player currently has open.

en: The GUI that the player currently has open.

syntax_14292.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14292.title: Page Title
syntax_14292.description: Get or set the title of a specific page in a menu.

en: Get or set the title of a specific page in a menu.

syntax_14293.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14293.title: Session's Menu
syntax_14293.description:
Get the menu of a menu session.
Returns null if the session is invalid.

en:
Get the menu of a menu session.
Returns null if the session is invalid.

syntax_14294.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14294.title: Slot Key from Menu
syntax_14294.description:
The key of a specific slot in a specific page of a menu.
This expression returns the key associated with the specified slot in the specified page of the given menu.
If the slot does not have an associated key, it returns nothing.
syntax_14294.syntax_pattern: [the] key of [the] slot %number% in [the] page %number% [of [the] menu %menu%]

en:
The key of a specific slot in a specific page of a menu.
This expression returns the key associated with the specified slot in the specified page of the given menu.
If the slot does not have an associated key, it returns nothing.

syntax_14295.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14295.title: Slot Key from Menu
syntax_14295.description:
The slot(s) of a specific key in a specific page of a menu.
This expression returns the slot(s) associated with the specified key in the specified page of the given menu.
If the key does not have any associated slots, it returns nothing.
syntax_14295.syntax_pattern: [the] slot[s] of [the] key %string% in [the] page %number% [of [the] menu %menu%]

en:
The slot(s) of a specific key in a specific page of a menu.
This expression returns the slot(s) associated with the specified key in the specified page of the given menu.
If the key does not have any associated slots, it returns nothing.

syntax_14296.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14296.title: Create / Edit GUI
syntax_14296.description:
The base of creating and editing GUIs.
Tips: This is a deprecated section, consider using EffSecCreateMenu and SecEditMenu instead.
syntax_14296.syntax_pattern: create [a] [new] gui [[with id[entifier]] %string%] with %inventory% [(and|with) ([re]move[e]able|stealable) items] [(and|with) shape %strings%]

en:
The base of creating and editing GUIs.
Tips: This is a deprecated section, consider using EffSecCreateMenu and SecEditMenu instead.

syntax_14297.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14297.title: Create Menu
syntax_14297.description:
Create a menu.
You can define the menu's properties, such as its inventory type, title, id, layout, page, click delay, and whether to hide the player's inventory.
You can also define the menu's contents and behavior in the section below this effect.
Tips: If you do not specify a default page, the menu will insert a page 0 with the given layout and title.
If you create a menu with a id that already exists, the old one will be destroyed.
syntax_14297.syntax_pattern: create [a] [phantom|static] menu with %inventorytype% titled (%string%|%textcomponent%) with layout %strings% [with id %string%] [with page %number%] [with %number% ms click delay] [(with|without) hide player inventory)]

en:
Create a menu.
You can define the menu's properties, such as its inventory type, title, id, layout, page, click delay, and whether to hide the player's inventory.
You can also define the menu's contents and behavior in the section below this effect.
Tips: If you do not specify a default page, the menu will insert a page 0 with the given layout and title.
If you create a menu with a id that already exists, the old one will be destroyed.

syntax_14298.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14298.title: Edit Menu
syntax_14298.description:
Edit an existing menu.
You can define the menu's contents and behavior in the section below this effect.

en:
Edit an existing menu.
You can define the menu's contents and behavior in the section below this effect.

syntax_14300.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14300.title: Override Slot
syntax_14300.description:
Override a specific slot in a specific page of a menu with a new item.
You can optionally provide a section to handle click events on the overridden slot.
Tips: If you didn't provide a section, the slot will simply be overridden without changing previous click behavior.

en:
Override a specific slot in a specific page of a menu with a new item.
You can optionally provide a section to handle click events on the overridden slot.
Tips: If you didn't provide a section, the slot will simply be overridden without changing previous click behavior.

syntax_14269.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14269.title: Update Page Title
syntax_14269.description:
Update the title of a specific page in a menu.
You can optionally refresh the menu for all viewers to see the updated title immediately.

en:
Update the title of a specific page in a menu.
You can optionally refresh the menu for all viewers to see the updated title immediately.

syntax_14306.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14306.title: Build Menu
syntax_14306.description:
Build a menu with specified properties.
You can specify the menu type (phantom or static), inventory type, title, layout, id, default page, click delay, and whether to hide the player inventory.
You can also provide an edit section to define additional properties or behaviors for the menu.
The created menu is stored in the specified variable.

en:
Build a menu with specified properties.
You can specify the menu type (phantom or static), inventory type, title, layout, id, default page, click delay, and whether to hide the player inventory.
You can also provide an edit section to define additional properties or behaviors for the menu.
The created menu is stored in the specified variable.

syntax_14307.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14307.title: Build and Insert Page
syntax_14307.description:
Insert a new page into a menu.
You can optionally specify the page index, layout, player inventory layout, and title for the new page.
If the page index is not provided, the new page will be added at the end of the menu.

en:
Insert a new page into a menu.
You can optionally specify the page index, layout, player inventory layout, and title for the new page.
If the page index is not provided, the new page will be added at the end of the menu.

syntax_14299.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14299.title: Map Key to Icon
syntax_14299.description:
Map a string key to an icon (item) in a menu.
You can optionally provide a section to handle click events on the icon.
Tips: If you didn't provide a section, the slot will simply be overridden without changing previous click behavior.
syntax_14299.syntax_pattern: map key %string% to ((icon|item)[s] %itemstacks%|button %string%) [for [(menu|gui)] %menu%] [on page(s) %numbers%)][(and (refresh|update))] [(and when clicked)]

en:
Map a string key to an icon (item) in a menu.
You can optionally provide a section to handle click events on the icon.
Tips: If you didn't provide a section, the slot will simply be overridden without changing previous click behavior.

syntax_14301.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14301.title: Set Slot Callback
syntax_14301.description:
Set a callback for a specific slot in a specific page of a menu.
You must provide a section to handle click events on the specified slot.

en:
Set a callback for a specific slot in a specific page of a menu.
You must provide a section to handle click events on the specified slot.

syntax_14255.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14255.title: On Menu Interact
syntax_14255.event_values: event-player, event-menu, event-menuclicktype, event-menusession, event-icon, event-page, event-clicked slot

syntax_14308.creator: heyhey123
syntax_14308.title: Define Button
syntax_14308.description:
Defines a button with the specified ID and icon. 
You must provide a 'when clicked' section to handle button click events. 
If a button with the same ID already exists, the new definition will overwrite the previous one.

en:
Defines a button with the specified ID and icon. 
You must provide a 'when clicked' section to handle button click events. 
If a button with the same ID already exists, the new definition will overwrite the previous one.
